---
title: Mini Step 2
sidebar:
  order: 2
---

```cfm {test:tutorial step=2 file="config/routes.cfm" mode="write" asserts-http="GET /ping → 200 \"pong\""}
<cfscript>
mapper()
    .get(name="ping", pattern="/ping", to="home##ping")
    .root(to="home##index", method="get")
    .wildcard()
.end();
</cfscript>
```
